recommendations.title: Best Sentiment Environment
recommendations.description: Trading performance is highest during Extreme Fear sentiment.
recommendations.action: Increase position sizing and take more trades during Extreme Fear phases.

recommendations.title: Worst Sentiment Environment
recommendations.description: Trading performance is lowest during Extreme Greed sentiment.
recommendations.action: Reduce risk or avoid trading during Extreme Greed phases.

recommendations.title: Solid Win Rate
recommendations.description: Current win rate is 58.5%, above the 50% breakeven threshold.
recommendations.action: Maintain discipline; consider a modest increase in position size.

recommendations.title: High Volatility Strategy
recommendations.description: Trading performance improves during high-volatility periods.
recommendations.action: Increase activity and size during volatile market conditions.
